name: dot-designs
description: Dot Designs — editorial studio site (React client + Node/Express server)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c magenta,green "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
